scenes.text: The dependency tree shows your project's full dependency graph with transitive dependencies indented below their parents.
Navigate through the tree with arrow keys. Non-compile scopes like test are labeled in brackets next to the dependency.
Press left to collapse a subtree, hiding all its transitive dependencies.
Press right to expand it again. The tree remembers which nodes were expanded.
Version conflicts are highlighted in the tree. Here, slf4j-api is requested at version 1.7.36 but resolved to 2.0.9.
